products.name: UGREEN USB-C to Lightning Cable 2m MFi Certified
products.description: UGREEN USB-C to Lightning cable with MFi certification ensures fast and safe charging for your Apple devices. Features durable nylon braiding, 20W PD fast charging support, and a 2-meter length for convenience. The cable supports data sync at 480Mbps and is compatible with iPhone 15/14/13/12/11 series, iPad Pro, and more.
